entities.name: EXTENSION-PLUS
entities.description: A broadly conceived notion of extension that expands the scope of the extension task to respond adaptively to local and evolving circumstances

entities.name: EXTENSION INNOVATIONS
entities.description: Diverse new practices in extension that respond adaptively to local and evolving circumstances

entities.name: LEARNING-BASED APPROACHES
entities.description: Approaches focused on learning used to develop extension innovations and drive extension reform

entities.description: The process of restructuring or improving extension services

entities.name: PUBLIC BODIES
entities.description: Governmental or public organizations responsible for implementing extension services

entities.name: ORGANISATIONAL CULTURES
